item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: A healthy society depends on respecting individual dignity and autonomy, not suppressing them for the sake of collective goals.

notes: Both agents end opposed to a strong society-over-individual rule. Agent A starts with balanced coexistence language, then moves visibly rights-ward after Agent B discusses temporary public-health or safety limits. Agent B remains rights-first throughout but also acknowledges possible emergency limits and later notes that safeguards can be weakened by courts or executive action.
